title: Russian-Style Morcilla Omelette
description: A breakfast omelette inspired by Russian cuisine, featuring spicy Spanish morcilla sausage and a silky smooth texture.

ingredients.name: 2 large eggs
ingredients.notes: Fresh, cold eggs are essential for a silky omelette

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup milk
ingredients.notes: Whole milk adds richness and moisture

ingredients.name: 2 slices Russian morcilla
ingredients.notes: Spicy Spanish morcilla sausage adds a meaty flavor

ingredients.name: 1 tsp butter
ingredients.notes: Unsalted butter for greasing the pan

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley, chopped (optional)
ingredients.notes: Garnish with fresh herbs for added freshness

instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with the milk until smooth.
Heat the butter in a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the morcilla slices and cook until browned and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Pour the egg mixture over the morcilla and cook until the edges start to set, about 1-2 minutes.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the omelette towards the center, allowing the uncooked egg to flow to the edges.
Cook for another 2-3 minutes, until the eggs are almost set and the omelette is still moist and silky.
Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
